productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Tan Sandals
description: Look adorable in this pair of classic, Greek-inspired sandals from carlton london. The weaved straps across the forefoot and adjustable backfoot buckle offers a comfortable Fit. Slip into them with a flowy dress and a shoulder bag, and enjoy those shopping sprees in the winter sun in comfort and style.UpperSynthetic leather forefoot woven strap with a backfoot buckled strap to customise fit and lock the foot in placeSoft footbed with a padded heel for all-day comfort OutsoleLightweight durable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
